text:
pgollucci    2010-01-14 23:19:21 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net-mgmt/grepcidr    Makefile 
  Added files:
    net-mgmt/grepcidr/files patch-grepcidr.c 
  Log:
  * Add an option to apply patch allowing to search for pattern anywhere in line
  * Add -DHAVE_STRING_H to make compiler happy
  * Bump PORTREVISION
  
  PR:             ports/141437
  Submitted by:   "Alexander V. Chernikov" <melifaro@ipfw.ru>
  Approved by:    maintainer timeout (1 month)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
